title: Minted: Money Mod
description: Minted Money adds banknotes and coins to Minecraft
body:
Minted: Money adds banknotes and coins to Minecraft.
Players can enjoy a simple and fun currency experience with these special items.
The mod focuses on adding color and entertainment to the game without introducing complex economy systems.

This mod supports Turkish Lira and US Dollar! And all their textures are realistically rendered! Euro is expected to be added soon!

And with the newly released major 2.0 update, many new things and features have been added to the game, and more will continue to be added.
